overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit commercial district in Night City. The player moves through covered walkways and open plazas filled with holographic advertisements, palm trees, and pedestrians, passing by a prominent purple-lit outdoor bar before descending into an underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along covered walkway observing digital advertisements and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman with illuminated pink umbrella walking past camera

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying motorcycle racing imagery with purple border
metal truss bridge structure spanning overhead with railings
tall palm trees lining the right side of the walkway
smooth concrete wall with mounted digital screens and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered concrete walkway in a futuristic city at night. Digital billboards displaying motorcycles line the left wall while palm trees are visible to the right. The camera moves forward through moderate pedestrian traffic, passing a woman with a glowing pink umbrella. Overhead, an elevated metal walkway structure spans the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with neon-lit outdoor bar

events.description: exiting covered walkway onto open wooden deck plaza with visible sky
approaching purple neon-lit outdoor bar with high-top seating

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza passing patrons seated at outdoor bar tables

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at bar stool using handheld device

entered.detail: outdoor bar structure with vibrant purple neon lighting and counter
tall round bar stools arranged around high tables on wooden deck

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from covered walkway to an open wooden plaza. A prominent outdoor bar with purple neon lighting occupies the right side, where patrons sit on high stools. The ground changes to wooden decking, and the camera moves through scattered pedestrian traffic while passing the bar area.

events.description: large Johnny Silverhand billboard becomes prominent on right side of plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing through plaza toward underpass entrance with large digital billboards ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella walking ahead toward underpass

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying Johnny Silverhand with 'FEEL THE CHROMATIC' text
small commercial stall with 'PAWNSHOP' signage and green lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving past the bar area, the plaza opens up to reveal massive holographic advertisements including a prominent Johnny Silverhand billboard. A pawnshop stall with green neon lighting sits on the right. The wooden deck continues as the camera approaches a concrete underpass entrance in the distance.

events.description: entering underpass area with concrete walls and descending ramp
ambient light decreases significantly entering shadowed underpass tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete ramp into darker underpass tunnel

entered.detail: descending concrete ramp leading into underground underpass
tunnel entrance with concrete walls and ceiling structure
digital screens displaying food advertisements with 'ALL' text

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrow underpass entrance. The wooden deck gives way to concrete as the camera descends a ramp into a darker, enclosed tunnel. Food advertisement billboards line the left wall while the ambient lighting shifts from vibrant neon to dim, shadowy tones. The surrounding architecture becomes brutalist concrete as the player enters the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a vibrant neon-lit commercial district that gradually descends into a dim, brutalist underpass. It begins on a covered concrete walkway lined with digital motorcycle billboards and palm trees, moving through pedestrian traffic and past a woman with a glowing pink umbrella. As the camera emerges from the corridor, the environment opens into a wooden plaza featuring a prominent purple-lit outdoor bar where patrons sit on high stools. The scene then expands further to reveal massive holographic advertisements and a green-lit pawnshop stall before the wooden decking gives way to a concrete ramp. Finally, the camera descends into a narrow underpass, where the vibrant neon glow shifts to shadowy tones and the walls are lined with food advertisements.
